title: Dynamic Dual-Granularity Skill Bank Improves Agentic RL Success Rates
summary: D2Skill, a new dynamic skill bank for reinforcement learning, boosts success rates by up to 20% over baseline methods.

title: LLM-Driven Candidate Assessment System for Human Resources
summary: A new system uses LLMs to automate candidate assessment and evaluation in HR, providing transparent results.

title: NeiGAD: Improved Graph Anomaly Detection via Spectral Analysis
summary: A new plug-and-play module captures neighbor information for enhanced graph anomaly detection, outperforming existing methods.

title: CoPE-VideoLM Reduces Overhead in Video Language Modeling
summary: This method leverages codec primitives to optimize transformers, reducing time and token usage by up to 86% and 93%, respectively.

title: Critic-Free Deep Reinforcement Learning for Maritime Coverage Path Planning
summary: Proposed framework improves efficiency and stability in coverage path planning on irregular hexagonal grids.

title: Large Language Models May Verbatim Recall Copyrighted Books During Fine-Tuning
summary: Fine-tuned LLMs can reproduce up to 85-90% of copyrighted books, bypassing safety measures.

title: Just-Enough Thinking: Reducing Overthinking in Large Reasoning Models
summary: Proposed method improves efficiency without sacrificing accuracy by terminating unnecessary reasoning steps.

title: Beyond Textual Knowledge for Vision-and-Language Navigation
summary: Framework integrates textual and visual knowledge to enhance semantic grounding in vision-language navigation tasks.

title: Spontaneous Functional Differentiation in Large Language Models Resembles Brain Networks
summary: LLMs exhibit spontaneous functional differentiation, similar to brain neural connections, enabling complex reasoning.

title: ClawMoat Protects Machines from AI Agent Threats
summary: Open-source runtime security tool guards against threats posed by rogue AI agents.

title: Axios JavaScript Library Compromised on NPM with Remote Access Trojan
summary: Popular Axios library is found to be compromised, containing remote access trojans posing a security threat.

title: Edge Reliability Gap in Vision-Language Models Under Visual Corruption
summary: Research shows distinct failure modes of compressed vision-language models on edge deployment under visual corruption.

title: LLM-Driven Agentic AI for Human Resources Candidate Assessment
summary: Proposes an automated candidate assessment system using large language models to improve HR processes.

title: Self-Bootstrapping Automated Program Repair with LLMs
summary: Proposes using Large Language Models to generate and evaluate synthetic training data for Automated Program Repair, addressing the scarcity of high-quality training data.

title: Evolutionary Discovery of Reinforcement Learning Algorithms via LLMs
summary: Introduces an evolutionary framework for discovering reinforcement learning algorithms using large language models, achieving competitive performance on benchmarks.

title: OptiMer: Optimal Distribution Vector Merging for Continual Pre-training
summary: Proposes OptiMer, a method for optimal distribution vector merging in continual pre-training of large language models, outperforming data mixing and model averaging.

title: Impact of AGENTS.md Files on AI Coding Agents' Efficiency
summary: Analyzes the impact of AGENTS.md files on runtime and token consumption for GitHub pull requests, showing lower median runtime with an AGENTS.md file.

title: Multi-agent AI System for TensorFlow to JAX Model Migration
summary: Introduces an AI-based multi-agent system that supports the automatic migration of TensorFlow-based deep learning models to JAX, reducing migration time significantly.

title: Webscraper: Leveraging MLLMs for Web Scraping
summary: Introduces Webscraper, a framework that leverages multimodal large language models to navigate dynamic web applications and extract structured data.

title: AI-Powered Multi-Agent Framework for Spatial Text-to-SQL
summary: Introduces an AI-powered multi-agent framework addressing spatial intent, schema ambiguity, and geometry-bearing tables in the context of spatial text-to-sql.

title: WybeCoder Framework for Verified Imperative Code Generation
summary: A new agentic code verification framework, WybeCoder, enables 'prove-as-you-generate' development leveraging LLMs and SMT solvers to improve software verification.

title: ChartNet Dataset Advances Chart Interpretation for AI/ML Models
summary: A multimodal dataset, ChartNet, features 1.5 million diverse chart samples to advance chart interpretation and reasoning capabilities in foundation models.

title: Hybrid Memory for Dynamic Video World Models
summary: A novel paradigm, Hybrid Memory, and HyDRA architecture effectively preserve subject identity and motion in video generation tasks.

title: Webscraper Framework for Multimodal Large Language Model Web Scraping
summary: Framework uses multimodal large language models to navigate dynamic web applications and extract structured data accurately.

title: Learning to Select Visual In-Context Demonstrations for MLLMs
summary: Proposes a Reinforcement Learning method, LSD agent, for selecting visual in-context demonstrations that outperforms k-Nearest Neighbor approaches.

title: IMPACT for Open-Set Time Series Anomaly Detection
summary: Framework leverages influence modeling to generate realistic anomalies and repurpose high-influential samples as supervised anomalies.

title: NeiGAD Enhances Graph Anomaly Detection
summary: A new module captures neighbor information through spectral analysis, improving graph anomaly detection accuracy.

title: MolmoPoint Improves VLM Pointing Accuracy
summary: Directly selecting visual tokens containing target concepts enhances performance in vision-language models.

title: Recycling Memory Processing for Efficient LLM Inference
summary: A pipeline optimizing memory processing reduces inference time and energy consumption on heterogeneous systems.

title: LLM-Driven Candidate Assessment in HR
summary: Agentic AI framework uses LLMs to generate structured evaluation reports for transparent candidate assessment.

title: EuraGovExam: A Multilingual Benchmark for Civil Service Exams
summary: Over 8,000 high-resolution scanned questions challenge vision-language models with layout-aware and cross-lingual reasoning.

title: Agentic Image Anonymization Reduces Re-identification Risk
summary: Multi-agent reasoning framework improves image anonymization by reducing person re-id risk and preserving image quality.

title: StepCache Reduces Latency in LLM Serving
summary: Backend-agnostic caching layer reuses segment-level outputs and verifies changes with lightweight checks, improving performance.

title: CoPE-VideoLM Optimizes Video Language Modeling
summary: Uses codec primitives and transformer-based encoders to reduce computational overhead in video language models.

title: Zero-Knowledge Proof in Machine Learning: A Survey
summary: Reviews the current state of ZKML research, highlighting challenges and future directions for verifiable machine learning.

title: UniGame Self-Adversarial Framework for Unified Models
summary: Improves coherence and stability of unified multimodal models by turning them into their own adversaries.

title: Federated Architecture for Sector-Led AI Governance in India
summary: Proposes a cohesive approach to mitigate policy fragmentation and connect goals with implementation plans.

title: Rectified MeanFlow Overcomes Curvature Bottleneck
summary: Leverages geometric principles to learn on straight paths, improving generative modeling.

title: ClawMoat Protects Against AI Agent Threats
summary: Introducing ClawMoat, an open-source security layer that protects machines from AI agent threats by acting as a 'moat' around credentials and sensitive data.

title: AI Agents Streamline TensorFlow to JAX Model Migration
summary: A multi-agent AI system significantly reduces the time needed for migrating deep learning models from TensorFlow to JAX, making use of static analysis and code quality metrics.

title: Disentanglement Framework Boosts Time Series Forecasting Accuracy
summary: Dual-Prototype Adaptive Disentanglement (DPAD) framework enhances time series forecasting by dynamically disentangling and leveraging complex temporal patterns.

title: CoPE-VideoLM Reduces Video Language Model Overhead
summary: CoPE-VideoLM slashes computational overhead in video language models by leveraging codec primitives and optimizing transformer-based encoders.

title: AI Tooling Dominates Software Engineer Workflows in 2026
summary: A survey of over 900 software engineers reveals that AI tool usage will be more prevalent by 2026, with Claude Code leading in tool adoption.

title: Webscraper Uses MLLMs for Index-Content Web Scraping
summary: Webscraper framework leverages multimodal large language models to navigate dynamic web applications and extract structured data from interactive interfaces.

title: Domain-Invariant Prompt Learning Enhances Vision-Language Models
summary: DiCoOp framework extends CoOp by learning domain-invariant prompts for vision-language models through adversarial training, improving generalization.

title: Enhancing Policy Learning with World-Action Model
summary: World-Action Model (WAM) improves policy learning for manipulation tasks by reasoning over future observations and actions, reducing training steps.

title: OptiMer Method for Continual Pre-Training Optimization
summary: OptiMer method optimizes distribution vector merging in continual pre-training of large language models, outperforming data mixing and model averaging.

title: Security Taxonomy Reveals OpenClaw AI Agent Weaknesses
summary: A systematic taxonomy of security vulnerabilities in the OpenClaw AI agent framework highlights structural weaknesses related to per-layer trust enforcement.

title: Scaling Laws Drive AI Progress and Efficiency Game
summary: The article explores the effectiveness of scaling laws in AI, abstracting away from realization details to predict progress but also driving a persistent efficiency game.

title: SAM 3 Enhances Object Detection and Segmentation Accuracy
summary: SAM 3 model improves object detection, segmentation, and tracking accuracy by introducing a presence head and using concept prompts.
